final:
module thermal_sensor_calibration (
    input [4:0] raw_temp,
    output [4:0] calibrated_temp
);
    assign calibrated_temp = (raw_temp + 5'b00011) & 5'b11111; // Adding offset of 3 and masking to 5 bits
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      calibrated_temp <= raw_temp - 5'b00011;
    end
  end

endmodule
